Notes: 2015 Radisson Hotel Minneapolis St. Paul Basketball Classic
Michigan Tech ranked #8 in WBCA Division II Top-25 Coaches Poll
MT #42 Danielle Blake, CSP #11 Anna Schmitt named to All-Tournament Team
CSP #30 Lauren Shifflett named Radisson Most Valuable Player
Game.Officials: David Peterson,  Adam Salo,  Tim Gilbertson
